# Gov Procurement Intel — ScriptMasterLabs
AI agent federal capture tools: contract awards, SDVOSB set-asides, agency spend, HMAC capture logs.
npm: npx @scriptmasterlabs/gov-procurement-intel
SDVOSB UEI G24VZA4RLMK3 CAGE 21U51
Pair with agent-wallet for pay/credit/compliance shell.
Landing: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/gov-procurement
